# INTENT

## User Request

Add editor support for multiple language sections, each with its own uploads, and show a language selector on public pages only when multiple languages exist.

## Requested Outcome

Users can add/remove language sections, upload/order images per language, and visitors can switch between languages on the public page.

## Constraints

- Keep one default language that cannot be removed.
- Preserve existing single-language behavior.
- Keep staged save behavior where practical.

## Open Questions

- None.
